en.description_en: A Jizō statue classified among other cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kagamiishi Town. It is located at Kagamiishi-machi Chūō 54.

items.name: 西光寺のたらようの木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A tarayō (Ilex latifolia) tree classified as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Kagamiishi Town. It is located at Kagamiishi-machi Kaganuma 76.
